item.description:
I'm currently a Google AI Resident in the Brain team in Montreal. My mentor is Laurent Dinh and we are working on generative models for unspervised object discovery.

In the past, I complited my master's at University of Amsterdam, where I worked with Rianne van den Berg (AMLAB) on priors for VAEs and semi-supervised learning, and wrote my thesis during an internship at Mila, where I worked with Devon Hjelm on fundamenta principles in Representation Learning for Zero Shot Learning.

In my free time, I practice yoga, acroyoga and read a lot.
